hero.title: Engineering Water Intelligence
hero.subtitle: From design to commissioning — we deliver turnkey water treatment, electromechanical, and civil infrastructure projects across Egypt and the MENA region.

services.label: WHAT WE ENGINEER
services.title: Comprehensive Engineering Solutions
services.subtitle: We deliver turnkey solutions across three interconnected pillars — water infrastructure, electromechanical systems, and civil construction. One contract, one team, zero coordination headaches.

waterTreatment.title: Water Treatment Plants
waterTreatment.description: Complete design, construction, and commissioning of potable water treatment systems — filtration, desalination, disinfection, and distribution networks.

sewageTreatment.title: Wastewater & Sewage Treatment
sewageTreatment.description: Industrial and municipal sewage treatment plants — biological treatment, membrane systems, and full effluent compliance.

hvac.title: HVAC Systems
hvac.description: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning engineering for commercial, industrial, and residential buildings.

fireFighting.title: Fire Fighting Systems
fireFighting.description: Complete fire suppression — sprinklers, wet/dry risers, FM200, hose reels, and integrated fire alarm systems.

electromechanical.title: Electromechanical Works
electromechanical.description: Full-scope electromechanical contracting — electrical panels, power distribution, control systems, and instrumentation.

civil.title: Civil & Infrastructure
civil.description: Excavation, earthworks, concrete construction, road works, and structural engineering for water infrastructure.

equipment.title: Equipment Supply
equipment.description: Procurement and supply of UV filters, pumps, blowers, membranes, pipes, air diffusers, and electrical panels.

design.title: Design & Consultation
design.description: 2D/3D engineering drawings, cost estimation, feasibility studies, and technical consultation.

chairman.label: LEADERSHIP
chairman.title: Vision That Builds Reality
chairman.quote: Many say that many parts bring a company together — but we believe the greatest strength is its people who dare to dream and do things uniquely different. We believe we can make the dream a reality.

projects.label: OUR PORTFOLIO
projects.title: Projects That Speak for Themselves
projects.subtitle: Every project is a testament to our engineering precision and commitment to delivery. Browse our track record across water treatment, electromechanical, and civil infrastructure.

testimonials.label: CLIENT TESTIMONIALS
testimonials.title: Trusted by Industry Leaders
testimonials.subtitle: Don't take our word for it — hear from the engineers, contractors, and organizations who have experienced the Infeworks difference.

clients.label: OUR PARTNERS
clients.title: Trusted By Industry Leaders
clients.subtitleClients: We've delivered engineering excellence for leading organizations across Egypt and the MENA region.
clients.subtitlePartners: Our technology partnerships ensure we deliver world-class equipment and systems for every project.

contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your engineering challenge. Our team typically responds within 24 hours. For urgent inquiries, call us directly.

footer.description: Engineering water intelligence — from design to commissioning. We deliver turnkey water treatment, electromechanical, and civil infrastructure across Egypt and the MENA region.
